description_long: This is a sleek, modern record player with a glossy black rectangular base and rounded edges. The large, circular turntable platter dominates the center, surrounded by a precision tonearm and cartridge assembly on the left side. The tonearm is straight and features a visible counterweight and pivot mechanism, with the stylus assembly at its end. Minimalist control elements, including a small round knob and a subtle button, are located on the front left and right corners. The surface is highly reflective, giving the device a polished, high-end appearance. There is no visible dust cover, and the branding is subtly placed on the top right and left corners.
description: A glossy black record player with a large central platter, straight tonearm, and minimalist controls. The design is modern and highly reflective, with no visible dust cover.
description_view_0: The record player is seen from a front-left angle, highlighting the platter, tonearm, and control knob on the left.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the full circular platter, the straight tonearm extending across, and the control knob on the left.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the tonearm's pivot and counterweight, with branding visible on the right.
description_view_3: A rear-left angle emphasizes the tonearm assembly and the branding on the left side.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, large, and centrally located, occupying most of the device's surface. It is circular, black, and has a smooth, glossy finish with a subtle central spindle. No grooves or patterns are visible.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, straight, and extends from the left side toward the center of the platter. It is medium-length, black, with a visible counterweight and pivot mechanism. The finish is matte to semi-gloss, and it is currently resting over the platter.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is present, attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small, metallic, and appears as a distinct component at the tip of the tonearm.
attribute_control_knobs: One round control knob is visible on the front left corner, black in color, with a smooth finish. A small button is also present on the front right. No visible labels or markings are apparent.
